meaning: adj.鍙嶅閲戣瀺鍟嗕笟鐣岀殑
examples: With Democratic politicians the big fear is about how antibusiness and anticapitalist they will be.
He had less use for the antibusiness attitude that often attaches to those disciplines.
Executives are warned of the dangers of funding antibusiness groups and giving hostile special interest groups more sway over corporate practices and policies.
